title: How Violets Came Blue.
content:
Love on a day, wise poets tell,
    Some time in wrangling spent,
    Whether the violets should excel,
    Or she, in sweetest scent.

    But Venus having lost the day,
    Poor girls, she fell on you:
    And beat ye so, as some dare say,
    Her blows did make ye blue.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "How Violets Came Blue."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
